zh.Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, England: 英國諾福爾可伯納姆 索普
zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Brewse於1431年1月出生在英國諾福爾可伯納姆 索普時，她的父親Sir Thomas Brewse26歲，母親Joan Calthorpe19歲。她於大約1454年與Sir John Randes在英國英格蘭艾可結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1510年在英國英格蘭艾可利可林享年79歲。

zh-hans.Rickling Manor, Essex, England: 英国英格兰艾可利可林
zh-hans.Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, England: 英国諾福爾可伯納姆 索普
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Brewse于1431年1月出生在英国諾福爾可伯納姆 索普时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Brewse26岁，母亲Joan Calthorpe19岁。她于大约1454年与Sir John Randes在英国英格兰艾可结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1510年在英国英格兰艾可利可林享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: Brewse
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of German and Danish   Kruse   or Dutch   Kroese  .

variants.name: Cruse
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name probably from an unidentified place in Normandy named with Old French crues, crus, creus ‘hollow’. Creuse (in Somme, Picardy) and Cruys-Straëte (formerly in Flanders, now in the French département of Nord), which have the same etymology, are alternative possibilities but seem less likely on geographical and tenurial grounds.
English: perhaps a nickname from Middle English crus(e) ‘bold, fierce’, although the regular development would be to Crowse (rhyming with house).

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Brewse was born in January 1431, in Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, England, her father, Sir Thomas Brewse, was 26 and her mother, Joan Calthorpe, was 19. She married Sir John Randes about 1454, in Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1510, in Rickling, Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Brewse est née en janvier 1431, à Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Brewse, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Joan Calthorpe, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Randes environ 1454, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1510, à Rickling, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Brewse im Januar 1431 in Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Brewse 26 und ihre Mutter Joan Calthorpe 19. Sie hat um 1454 in Essex, England, United Kingdom Sir John Randes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1510 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Rickling, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Brewse è nata il nel gennaio 1431 nel Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, England, sua padre, Sir Thomas Brewse, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Joan Calthorpe, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Randes circa 1454, nel Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1510, nel Rickling, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Brewseが1431年1月にイギリスノーフォルクブルンハム ソルペで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Brewseは26歳，母Joan Calthorpeは19歳であった。約1454年にイギリスイギリスエセックスでSir John Randesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1510年にイギリスイギリスエセックスリックリングで79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Brewse(이)가 1431년 1월 영국 노르폴크 번함 소에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Brewse(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Calthorpe(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 1454년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 Sir John Randes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1510년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 릭링에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Brewse nasceu em janeiro de 1431, em Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Brewse, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Joan Calthorpe, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Randes aproximadamente 1454, em Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1510, em Rickling, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 79 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Brewse родилась январь 1431 г. в местности бурнам таурп, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Brewse было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Calthorpe, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Randes около 1454 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1510 г. в местности рикклинг, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 79 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes Brewse nació en enero de 1431, en Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Brewse, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Joan Calthorpe, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Sir John Randes aproximadamente 1454, en Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1510, en Rickling, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 79 años.
